diagnosis_name: Gender Dysphoria in Adolescents and Adults

symptoms.description: The patient experiences a marked disparity between their experienced gender and their assigned gender.
The patient has a strong desire to be rid of their primary or secondary sex characteristics.
The patient strongly desires the primary or secondary sex characteristics of another gender.
The patient expresses a powerful desire to be of another gender.
The patient desires to be treated by others as another gender.
The patient strongly believes they possess the typical feelings and reactions of another gender.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
The patient expresses a powerful desire to be of another gender.
The patient expresses a strong preference for wearing clothing typical of the experienced or expressed gender, and resists wearing typical clothing of their assigned gender.
The patient strongly prefers cross-gender roles in make-believe or fantasy play.
The patient exhibits a strong preference for toys, games, or activities typical of another gender.
The patient exhibits a strong preference for playmates of the experienced or expressed gender.
The patient strongly rejects toys, games, and activities that are typical of their assigned gender.
The patient has a strong desire to be rid of their primary or secondary sex characteristics.
The patient strongly desires the primary or secondary sex characteristics of another gender.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Symptoms characteristic of gender dysphoria that cause distress but do not meet full criteria
duration_rule: Variable (e.g., symptoms met for less than 6 months)

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits symptoms characteristic of gender dysphoria that fall below the full diagnostic threshold.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Gender dysphoria symptoms present but insufficient information for a specific diagnosis

symptoms.description: The patient presents with symptoms of gender dysphoria, but there is insufficient information to make a definitive diagnosis.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
